3012400.name: Morriton Manor Stories: Nordic Whispers
3012400.description:
Dark tales are told of the island of the Fortvil family: stories of unimaginable horrors, demonic curses, and mysterious creatures from the underworld. When the famous Morriton Manor Investigators vanish on the island, Leah Glessner, Private Investigator of the Supernatural, is sent to rescue them.

The island is under the influence of a dark curse and trapped in a never-ending time loop. Armed with her photographic memory, Leah Glessner sets out to solve the case. An adventure full of mystery, strange characters, intrigue and unexplainable phenomena begins.

In this game, you customize the skills of the protagonist and shape Leah Glessner’s approach to the investigation. Explore the island, gather clues, and use a unique photographic memory to recall key information at crucial moments. Mastering your memories allows you to influence dice rolls and boost your character’s stats. Guide Leah as she unravels the island’s darkest secrets and solves the case.

Features

  • Play as a Private Investigator of the Supernatural.
  • Curses! Demons! Dark secrets of the underworld!
  • Customize your character’s skills. Solve the case your way.
  • Make use of a photographic memory. Find the right clues and recall them at the right moment.
  • Roll the dice! Take your chances.
  • Make tough decisions and find your perfect way through a timeloop.
3012400.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 简体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
